<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <script>
        function link() {
            location.href = 'https://recruit.izawa-metal.co.jp/';
            //window.open( "","_blank" );
        }
        var referrerURL = document.referrer;
        window.onpageshow = function(event) {
            if (event.persisted) {
                location.href = referrerURL;
            } else {
                setTimeout('link()', 0);
            }
        };
    </script>
